items.title: Harvard scientists turn a silicon chip into a DNA writing machine

items.title: Tiny silica particles wiped out aggressive prostate cancer in mice

items.title: Scientists finally crack nature's secret for building better cancer drugs
items.summary: Researchers have cracked the code behind bacteria's ability to naturally manufacture multiple versions of powerful anti-cancer drugs. The discovery could make it much easier to engineer new cancer treatments inspired by nature, including improved versions of existing medicines.
